title: Trainee Solicitor
description:
Trainee Solicitor – 6 Months

This role, based in Singapore, focuses on providing junior support across the office, with a particular focus on International Private Client work, alongside International Arbitration work. The position involves client interaction and delivering a high-quality service. This role will support with complex, cross-border matters for the firm’s key clients, often navigating challenging regulatory and international issues.

Roles and Responsibilities:

  • This role will work with clients based across a range of geographical locations, and provide the opportunity to develop further international outlook
  • Transactional support and assisting fee earners
  • Research tasks
  • Liaising with clients as required
  • Document review
  • Proof reading
  • Drafting documents across a range of teams
  • Due diligence
  • Point of contact for third parties
  • Knowledge management for the team
  • Supporting other teams as required, and
  • Support and attending marketing and BD events.

Person Specification:

  • Currently undertaking qualifying work experience
  • Experience working within an international law firm and dealing with international clients on a regular basis
  • Manages time effectively and performs well under time and work pressures
  • Has the ability to develop effective working relationships at all levels
  • Strong English language skills, confident in both verbal and written communication with a diverse range of clients
  • A strong team player, and
  • Has a flexible approach and willing to go the extra mile.

postedCompany.description:
We are an international law firm with a focus on private capital at the intersection of personal, family and business.


Our expertise lies in Private Capital and we offer a range of legal services from Singapore. These include Wealth Structuring and Planning, US Tax, IRS Appeals and Representation, Funds, Family Office establishment and governance, transactional services for investments, M&A, Real Estate Investment and management (including Hotels & Hospitality), Investigations and International Arbitration.

Our 13 offices across the UK, Europe, Asia and the Middle East provide a gateway to our whole firm connecting you with the best advisers and serving cross-border legal needs.

Charles Russell Speechlys LLP’s office in Singapore is a Foreign Law Practice.
postedCompany.name: CHARLES RUSSELL SPEECHLYS LLP

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
